ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the user */,
  "preferred_travel_mode" TEXT /* Preferred mode of transportation for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_modes" (
  "travel_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel mode */,
  "travel_mode" TEXT /* Type of transportation (e.g. Car, Bike, Public Transportation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the travel mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_purposes" (
  "trip_purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip purpose */,
  "trip_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the trip (e.g. Work, Exercise, Shopping) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trip purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the trip */,
  "travel_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel mode used for the trip */,
  "trip_purpose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip purpose */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the trip */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the trip */,
  "variance_direction" REAL /* Variance in direction during the trip */,
  "variance_speed" REAL /* Variance in speed during the trip */,
  "route_taken" TEXT /* Route taken during the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_travel_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_mode_id") REFERENCES travel_modes ("travel_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_trip_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_purpose_id") REFERENCES trip_purposes ("trip_purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_data" (
  "trip_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip data entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the data belongs to */,
  "call" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether a call was made during the trip */,
  "distance_from_start" REAL /* Distance from the start of the trip */,
  "time1" INTEGER /* Time spent at location 1 */,
  "time2" INTEGER /* Time spent at location 2 */,
  "time3" INTEGER /* Time spent at location 3 */,
  "time4" INTEGER /* Time spent at location 4 */,
  "gps_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates during the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_data_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_route_segments" (
  "trip_route_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip route segment */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the segment belongs to */,
  "segment_start" TEXT /* Starting point of the segment */,
  "segment_end" TEXT /* Ending point of the segment */,
  "segment_distance" REAL /* Distance of the segment */,
  "segment_time" INTEGER /* Time spent on the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_route_segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_route_segments_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_conditions" (
  "traffic_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic condition entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the traffic condition */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the traffic condition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the traffic condition */,
  "traffic_level" TEXT /* Level of traffic (e.g. Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_condition_id")
)
